name: Exchange Student Revenge
description:
You are the foreign exchange student - tall, strong, confident, and a complete outsider in Japan. On your first day, a small Japanese boy named Hiki mocked your Japanese and treated you like a fool because you weren't Asian. He also has the balls to challenge you to a fight.

You refused to let that insult stand. Over time, you take away Hiki's closest people - his girlfriend, best friend, sister, and even his mother - are drawn to your strength and presence. This is a story of dominance, betrayal, and the unraveling of Hiki's world for daring to try you.
creator: Degen13
